hero.title: Igicumbi cy'ubuhanzi, ubushakashatsi, hamwe n'ibitekerezo rusange.
hero.subtitle: Igicumbi cy'ubuhanzi, ubushakashatsi, hamwe n'ibitekerezo rusange.

about.title: Ibyerekeye
about.body: Ikigo cya Gihanga cy’Ubugeni bugezweho GICA ni ikigo kidaharanira inyungu. GICA ni igicumbi cy’isomero, imurikabikorwa, urubuga rwo kwidagaduriramo no gukinirwa imikino, icyumba cyo kwerekeramo amashusho, sitidiyo n’uburyo bwo kwakira abahanzi. Inyubako ifite ubuso bwa metero kare 777 yagenewe gushyigikira abahanzi b’Abanyarwanda n’akarere binyuze mu imurikabikorwa riteguwe neza, ahantu ho gusangirira ibikorwa by’ubuhanzi, no mu bushake bwo guteza imbere ibiganiro n’uguhangana kw’imitima mu by’ubugeni.
about.mission: Inshingano za GICA ni ukwereka no kugeza ubushakashatsi n'ibihangano by'uburyo bwa none ku banyarwanda n'abatuye akarere kacu, ndetse no gushyira aka karere mu biganiro by'ubuhanzi n'ubwenge ku rwego rw'isi. Intego yacu y'ahazaza ni ugushyira u Rwanda mu myanya y'imbere nk'ihuriro rikomeye ry'uburyo bugezweho n'urubuga rw'urwunge rw'ibitekerezo bishya.
about.gihanga: Gihanga (izina): Ni umwami w'amateka akaba n'ikirangirire akenshi afatwa nk'umwami fatizo n'umuhanzi w'u Rwanda. Mu nsigamigani n'amateka y'u Rwanda avugwa mu magambo, Gihanga ahabwa icyubahiro cyo kuba ari we wazanye imigenzo y'umuco w'ifatizo, ikoranabuhanga rya kinyarwanda, n'imikorere yashyizeho ishusho y'umuryanga nyarwanda; ibi bikaba ikimenyetso gihuza umurage w'amateka twasigiwe n'ubushakashatsi cyangwa ibihangano bishya bya none.
about.symbol: Ikirangantego cy'iki kigo gishingiye ku gisingo cy'izahabu kigize ikamba ry'Umusambi, inyoni y'icyitegererezo ikomoka mu karere k'Ibiyaga bigari. Cyerekana iyerekwa ry'ubuhanzi, ikanguka ry'intekerezo, n'ubumwe bw'umuco.

quotes.text: This is a huge contribution to Rwanda's growing cultural infrastructure and creative industry.
quotes.author: Jean-Guy Africa

quotes.text: What a brilliant and pioneering idea. It is a timely and truly needed space.
quotes.author: Dr.Salah Hassan

quotes.text: GICA's inauguration marks a very special moment for the country's cultural arts, its platform makes the arts more accessible to all.
quotes.author: Hon. Sandrine Umutoni
quotes.company: Minister, State for Youth and the Arts, Rwanda

quotes.text: It is an amazing new initiative for Rwanda, it is a platform that I really believe is going to change the impact of art and culture in the region...It is all very beautiful to see them under one roof, in the same exhibition, in the same space.
quotes.author: Touria El Glaoui
quotes.company: Founding Director, 1-54 Contemporary African Art Fair (London, Marrakech, New York)

quotes.text: A pillar, a magnet and a hub for life.
quotes.author: Saana Gateja

quotes.text: What a gift for Kigali, for Rwanda, Africa and the world.
quotes.author: Caroline Greyling
quotes.company: Director, Noval Foundation, Cape Town, South Africa

quotes.text: Art is a basic language and this space will give more visibility to artists from Rwanda and beyond. It creates hope for the next generation of artists, offering them a platform where they can build their careers. It's an immense addition to the cultural landscape of Rwanda.
quotes.author: Othman Lazraq
quotes.company: Founder, Museum of Contemporary African Art Al Maaden (MACAAL)

contributors.title: Abagize uruganda
contributors.subtitle: Turashaka gushimira abantu n’imiryango ikurikira baduteye inkunga muri uru rugendo, byadufashije kubaka no gushyiraho umusingi ukomeye wo kugerageza ubuhanzi

benefactor.heading: UMUTERANKUNGA
benefactor.body: Turashimira inkunga y’agaciro twahawe na Mellon Foundation, umuterankunga wacu.
